name: Ignas
communicatingRationale:
{"score":"10.00","tn":6,"rn":6,"breakdown":{"0x2e701a942a8ed6f9ec8302cea866ab08648eeef0d07170814e3a3c3eb4e48415":{"validRationale":true,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/27188/46","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/non-constitutional-arbitrum-dao-delegate-code-of-conduct-formalizing-the-daos-operations/27188","createdAt":"2024-11-01T13:31:55.000Z","rationale":" This seems like a smart move, especially with the Arbitrum DAO growing to over 800 delegates (data from Kamar). Btw, I know it’s tough for the mods to keep track of everyone’s actions and make sure they meet the standards for professionalism, transparency ,… So having a clear set of values and behaviors will help hold each delegate responsible for what they do. 
 I have a question, though. Will there be a clear penalty for delegates who break the Code of Conduct in the Delegate Incentive Program? For example, will a delegate be removed right away for any mistake, or will it depend on how serious it is? I’m asking because I plan to run in December   
 By the way, really happy to see this proposal moving forward! "},"0x6065f661e3f2a5673284d3d5801dfa0126218c1840215426b576effc19fcc107":{"validRationale":true,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/26967/54","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/non-constitutional-treasury-management-v1-2/26967","createdAt":"2024-11-15T10:54:57.000Z","rationale":" I voted “For” on Snapshot because I believe Treasury and Grow management tracks will help Arbitrum build a stronger financial system with flexible investment options - make sure for long-term development and stability. "},"0x76ebc8056e283411cfed5cefad171e245b56fe3bc3d36d702244aab3faae689c":{"validRationale":true,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/27020/70","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/proposal-for-financial-restitution-for-arbitrumdao-grant-winners/27020","createdAt":"2024-11-22T10:14:03.000Z","rationale":" I voted “For” this proposal. I believe we should prioritize the community. The amount requested isn’t much, and the DAO can afford it. In crypto, waiting months for grants can be risky because market fluctuations can seriously affect projects. By the way, DAO should learn from this to move fast as well as prioritize the community initiatives. "},"0xf922eb584e616475100222fba40b0d6574ffc113bbb5b92b76e40bb2a91e45dc":{"validRationale":true,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/27492/47","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/hackathon-continuation-program/27492","createdAt":"2024-11-25T10:51:03.000Z","rationale":" I think this proposal is a great way to follow up projects from the hackathon and bring more value to Arbitrum. So voted In favour,  but would like to share 2 concerns: 
 
 What’s the plan to make sure these projects keep growing after the program ends, and don’t just rely on short-term support from Arbitrum and RnDAO? 
 If a project doesn’t meet its goals or doesn’t deliver as expected, how will the DAO protect the funds given to them? 
 "},"# (V2) Arbitrum Research & Development C":{"validRationale":true,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/ignas-delegate-communication-thread/27208","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":null,"createdAt":"2024-11-01T13:29:06.000Z","rationale":"Believes in the importance of ongoing programs for governance strength and professional financial management."},"# Establishing a DAO Events Budget for 2":{"validRationale":true,"post":"https://forum.arbitrum.foundation/t/ignas-delegate-communication-thread/27208","voted":true,"updated":"automatically","proposalTopic":null,"createdAt":"2024-11-01T13:28:02.000Z","rationale":"Voted for clear event budget to enhance organization and responsiveness, attracting more participants."}}}
